## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`mix test`)
- [ ] No compiler warnings (`mix compile --warnings-as-errors`)
- [ ] Formatted (`mix format`)
- [ ] New modules have corresponding test files
- [ ] No debug statements (`IO.inspect`, `dbg`, `console.log`)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] Security: tenant isolation not weakened, policies not bypassed
